top_stories.title: AI Agents Are Getting Control Flow — Not Just More Prompts
top_stories.summary: Developers are moving past prompt chaining to give agents real branching logic, loops, and error recovery — fundamentally changing how AI workflows are built.

top_stories.title: Anthropic Releases Claude's Extended Thinking API
top_stories.summary: Anthropic opened programmatic access to Claude's internal reasoning traces, letting developers inspect and build on the model's step-by-step thinking.

top_stories.title: Schools Are Banning AI — Students Are Using It Anyway
top_stories.summary: A widening gap between school AI policies and student behavior is forcing educators to rethink blanket bans in favor of structured AI literacy programs.

top_stories.title: Open-Source LLMs Cross the GPT-4 Threshold on Coding Benchmarks
top_stories.summary: Several community fine-tunes of Llama and Mistral now outscore GPT-4 on HumanEval and SWE-bench, accelerating the shift toward self-hosted inference.

top_stories.title: RAG vs. Long Context: Developers Are Picking Sides
top_stories.summary: As context windows hit 1M tokens, teams are debating whether retrieval-augmented generation is still worth the complexity overhead.

top_stories.title: EU AI Act Compliance Deadlines Begin Hitting Mid-Size Companies
top_stories.summary: The first wave of EU AI Act obligations is landing on companies outside big tech, triggering a scramble for documentation, audits, and risk assessments.

top_stories.title: Google Drops Gemini 2.5 Flash — Sub-Second Responses at Scale
top_stories.summary: Google's latest Gemini model targets production latency requirements with a sub-second time-to-first-token across reasoning and coding tasks.

top_stories.title: Cursor Hits 1M Developers — AI Coding Tools Go Mainstream
top_stories.summary: Cursor's milestone signals that AI-assisted coding has moved past early adopters and is becoming the default for professional software development.

ideas.title: What Is AI Agent Control Flow — And Why Does It Matter?
ideas.rationale: Agents are the next major AI skill gap; this topic is trending hard with low existing Aesop coverage.

ideas.title: AI in Your Child's Classroom: What Parents Need to Know in 2026
ideas.rationale: High novelty score — AI education policy is accelerating faster than parental awareness.

ideas.title: The EU AI Act Is Here — What Ordinary People Should Understand
ideas.rationale: Policy deadlines are real and imminent; most plain-language explainers are still written for lawyers.

ideas.title: RAG Explained: How AI Looks Up Information Before Answering
ideas.rationale: RAG is a foundational concept most readers encounter but few truly understand.

ideas.title: How AI Safety Researchers Are Trying to Understand What's Inside These Models
ideas.rationale: Interpretability work is gaining public visibility and aligns with Aesop's honest-education mission.

ideas.title: Open-Source AI Is Catching Up Fast — Here's What That Means for You
ideas.rationale: The open/closed model divide is a key literacy concept with no accessible Aesop treatment yet.

ideas.title: AI Coding Tools: A Plain-English Guide for Non-Programmers
ideas.rationale: Cursor and Copilot are now household names in tech; non-programmers deserve a clear explainer.

ideas.title: How to Clone a Voice with AI — And Why That's Both Useful and Risky
ideas.rationale: Voice AI is accelerating and the dual-use risk angle is undercovered in accessible writing.
